Name: 3_you_for_this_thank
Representative_Docs: ['I don\'t even have word to describe this. The best word here would probably be disgusting. This guy knew what he was doing was wrong, and yet he STILL did it because he was lonely? What the hell is actually wrong with some of these people?! It disgusts me that Roblox banned someone who made their app safer, because he was "ruining their public image" what you and JiDion are doing is amazing. You\'re making this world safer for children. Some of these predators are absolutely disgusting and sick to the head.', 'Thank you for what you do', "It's very clear at this point that Roblox supports predators, and honestly, I wouldn't be surprised if the Roblox upper management are also predators. Everything Roblox people are doing is a huge red flag. I know my kids will never be back on Roblox again, that's for sure. Thank you, my dude, and all the people who make it possible to protect the kids. My kids are some of the kids you are saving from these sick, twisted monsters, and for that, I am truly grateful for what you all do."]

Name: 5_and_was_to_he
Representative_Docs:
['Um. So this incident recently just happened. I met 2 people in a Roblox game and 1 was a boy and the other was a girl. We talked for a bit and they said their ages, 14 turning 15. The girl told the boy that they would look good together, he responded with lol. Which I kind of questioned, but I didn’t say anything. So we all added each other and made a group chat and that was it. Two days later, she told us that she had something to tell us and she said she was 22 years old. So me wanting to be a criminal prosecutor when I grow up, I went off on her. Then the boy private messaged me and told me that he couldn’t believe it. He didn’t know what to do and also that she told him other stuff as well. That same day we all met, but I had left early. So he said when I was gone, she said stuff like, he was cute, he made her blush, and that they would look good together. So I went back to the group chat and confronted her saying let’s hop on vc. She questioned it, but I told her wanting a clear explanation and answer isn’t weird. But she refused. Then she told us it was all a joke saying she saw it on social media, which I find funny because I never seen any video with someone pretending to be an older person talking to a minor as a joke. I told her that is not funny AT ALL and that kids are truly affected by this, and which the boy had told me in private message that he was traumatized. And the day after of meeting them, I heard her voice when she said hi and the first thing I thought of is that she sounded way older, but I didn’t question it at the time. I reported her three times already, but of course Roblox won’t do anything about it. (PLEASE SOMEONE READ THIS HER USER IS: Itsyagirltiti02) THANKS', 'Hello, this account is shared by the squad but I’d like to go anonymously.

This is a true story that happened to me
———————————————————————
So this was a long time ago, I was 8 and I really loved Roblox. I also loved to try out new games and make friends. At the moment I was looking for something to play bc I was getting bored and wanted to find something fun to do! I searched up hangout games bc I wanted to make friends!  Anyways while I was in the game and I’m pretty sure it was a club game, I think you can see where I’m going with this.. a guy came up to me and said that I looked cool and wanted to be my friend. I said yes ofc and we were talk for a few weeks, he seemed so sweet and nice but little did I know what was coming next.. it was a normal day after school, I finished my homework so I went online to play with him. While we were talking though out this new week he was pretty weird and acted different from usual.. I was talking to him and then he asked me REALLY weird questions about my life, luckily I told my mom bc I had a weird feeling and when she read the messages she was disgusted by his acts. She blocked and unfriended him from my account and now I know more about internet safety. I will never get discord bc you never know what can happen on that platform.. ever since I’ve been trying to protect my younger friends from people like them, they feel like I’m a mom to them so I feel that if they’re parents aren’t gonna do anything I’ll step in and be the parent that WILL protect them from online harassment/predators..
—————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————————
Everything I just said was a true story and I said this bc I want YOU ALL to know about this bc this is just another example of a predator that will use trust to get you to believe that their a nice person', 'Story 1.

Hey schlep, not sure if u can catch this predator or this guy is a predator a few years ago, i was playing apex legends with my brother and a guy randomly approached me (btw his user was Mr_Noob) i had vc and he had too so we started chatting. I was 10 by the time, and i wanted friends. He started chatting with me day by day. One day, he asked me for my number and i refused. Then, he gave me his number. We started texting and he always said how he really wanted to make me pregnant and have kids. He sent me a GIF of a woman on top of a man and more innapropriate stuff. He was 25, and saying at the age of 9 i would be a perfect girlfriend, and he even asked me where i live. Of course i didnt say anything. Then he suddenly wanted to facetime... He kept calling me over and over... I responded and he actually looked kinda crappy. He looked like this guy from this video but not exactly like it. He told me he was from Pakistan, and he wanted to meet me irl. I blocked him after that. Still scared of predators...
Story 2.
I was just doing some fxf (fxf means follow x follow basically u follow someone's channel and they follow u back) and this one guy, he was a minor tho, started texting me. It was worse than i thought. I had to get my parents involved. He wouldnt leave me alone, and he would say that he is sorry and he loves me. He sent me n*ked GIFs from where he could find. I still have his number tho, but if hes a minor i cant do anything (He is 14 or 15)
Well, things got worse. He actually asked me for my location, face, and sent me a lot of sus emojis. And he actually told me how he really wants to make kids with me. I was uncomfortable and everytime i told him to f*ck off and leave me alone, he would say "im sorry beautiful, im truly sorry..~"
I never forgave him. He even tried to stalk me.

Im just telling this story for everyone to hear, maybe they have some similar stories!

 From schlep, i just learned a few things i want to tell everyone:
1. Even if somebody called you pretty but u met the person online, dont accept it as a compliment, the person is trying to gather all your trust and trick you.
2. NEVER SHARE YOUR PERSONAL DATA! Even your location can cause danger. Please dont give your location to strangers.
3. If you dont know who to call for help, call your parents. Your parents know better and will help you.
4. Block the person! Yes, i agree, many persons love attention but, its a dangerous thing.
5. NEVER SHOW YOUR FACE!! I did but, hey i was kinda lonely back then and i needed some friends, but please dont do that because its kind of dangerous...

Roblox isnt a safe platform anymore. David promised its a safe game to play, but looks like now, its not anymore..
#FREESCHLEP!!

Stay safe yall']
